title: Socket MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Socket MCP Server for Claude
Security analysis and vulnerability scanning for dependencies
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Socket
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `security` `dependencies` `vulnerability-scanning` `npm` `supply-chain`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp add --transport http socket https://mcp.socket.dev/ && claude mcp list
```

## Config
```json
{
  "socket": {
    "url": "https://mcp.socket.dev/",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp add --transport http socket https://mcp.socket.dev/ && claude mcp list
